default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX Labs' AI-assisted content creation services for Accelevents' SEO and content marketing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-assisted content creation with human oversight, producing 5-10 high-quality pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Their process involves 250 compute steps, fact-checking, and customization based on client data and brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Patricia currently uses a manual AI-driven process for content creation but struggles with scaling (3 articles/month vs. desired 10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs' service starts at $9-12k/month with a 90-day initial period, including growth strategy and content production](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs' Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows with 250 compute steps for each piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Incorporates client data, brand guidelines, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Human editors and fact-checkers involved in the process](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Produces 5-10 high-quality content pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Focuses on SEO-driven content with internal linking and topic clustering](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Sugo: Tripled traffic from 7,000 to 21,000 in six months](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Steadily: Grew from 20,000 to 120,000 monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Homebase: Maintains 500,000 monthly traffic](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Content Hierarchy and Fact-Checking

  - [Prioritizes client-provided internal content](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Uses fact-checkers to verify information against trusted sources](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Filters out potentially inaccurate or irrelevant external content](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

### Integration with Existing Systems

  - [Can integrate with HubSpot for tracking conversions and lead sources](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
  - [Uses Clay for lead scoring and ICP identification](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=2584.0)
  - [Provides templates and consulting for setting up tracking and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)

### Customization and Onboarding

  - [Two-week setup period to fine-tune algorithms and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Can incorporate existing prompts and processes from clients](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Ongoing optimization based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)

### Pricing and Commitment

  - [$9-12k per month for full service](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [90-day initial commitment period](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [No free trials offered due to the extensive setup process](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

## Next Steps

  - Patricia to review GrowthX Labs website and consume available video content
  - [Jimmy to add Patricia to Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=3445.0)
  - [Patricia to consider joining GrowthX Labs' advisor network of CMOs](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion when Patricia is ready to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/8PstU41mMF_Tnk3c7yjGej1rrrs7zXZm?tab=summary&timestamp=3460.0)

Add Patricia to GrowthX Slack channel for ongoing communication
